boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: appeal deadline extension.

final_answer: Wave5 CTL record confirms exact match on policy exception, appeal ID, scope, and boundary. Policy permits execution when source closes boundary. Action may proceed without defect.
